attribution_window_note: TikTok Business API report/integrated/get. Attribution window assumed TikTok default click 7d / view 1d unless Ads Manager says otherwise. API does not expose website CTA/VTA purchase value here; VTA count uses vta_complete_payment when available, CTA count uses cta_purchase or cta_conversion fallback.
